policy_justification: Phase 24 implements durable transaction persistence (persist-before-broadcast), startup reconciliation (receipt/nonce checks), and strict receipt-based attribution using the ExecutionSuccess event. The system is live-capable but remains default-off, requiring explicit operator activation of ENABLE_BROADCAST and DRY_RUN_ONLY=false. Safety gates prevent ambiguous half-live states.
constraints: Live mode (canary_live_mode_enabled) requires ENABLE_BROADCAST=true AND DRY_RUN_ONLY=false
Durable persistence records PendingLiveTx to canary_state.json BEFORE broadcast
Startup reconciliation resolves stale transactions via receipt or sender-nonce checks
Strict attribution requires ExecutionSuccess event; HALTS on missing logs
Captures real Base L1 data/security fees from on-chain receipts
Tenderly simulation is mandatory for live-mode preflight
